# Workflows Complete

Complete ongoing work items.

## Process

1. Review Remaining Work
   - Check pending items
   - Prioritize
   - Estimate effort

2. Execute Completion
   - Work through items
   - Verify each one
   - Document results

3. Finalize
   - Run tests
   - Update documentation
   - Clean up

4. Report
   - What completed
   - What remains
   - Lessons learned
